Happy Women's Day
Amma! 🌸
My Amma & me 💛
Dear Amma, 💖

Every single day, I see how hard you work, how much you care, and how endlessly you love. You are not just my mother — you are my hero, my teacher, my best friend, and my safe place.

Your cooking fills our home with warmth, your laughter fills our hearts with joy, and your presence makes every moment feel complete. Whether it's a celebration or an ordinary Tuesday, you make life beautiful.

I may not say it enough, but I see everything you do. Every sacrifice, every sleepless night, every prayer you sent up for me — I carry all of it with gratitude and love.

On this Women's Day, I want the whole world to know — you are the most incredible woman I know.

Thank you for being YOU, Amma. 🌸

With all my love, always 💛
🌸💐✨ 🌺💛🦋 🌼💖
🌍 International Women's Day 2025 🌍

Happy Women's Day

Amma! 💐

You are the sunshine in our lives, the strength in our hearts, and the love that holds our world together. 🌟
